zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnoulf de Montgomery於1066年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親Roger de Montgomery44歲，母親Mabel Talvas41歲。他和Lafracoth O'Brien至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1119年之後在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可 卡素，埋葬在法國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Arnoulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnoulf de Montgomery was born in 1066, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Roger de Montgomery, was 44 and his mother, Mabel Talvas, was 41. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Lafracoth O'Brien. He died after 1119, in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnoulf de Montgomery est né en 1066, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Roger de Montgomery, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mabel Talvas, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Lafracoth O'Brien. Il est décédé après 1119, à Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnoulf de Montgomery 1066 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Montgomery 44 und seine Mutter Mabel Talvas 41. Er hatte mit Lafracoth O'Brien mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1119 in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoulf de Montgomery è nato il nel 1066 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Roger de Montgomery, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Talvas, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Lafracoth O'Brien. Morì dopo il 1119, nel Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnoulf de Montgomeryが1066年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Roger de Montgomeryは44歳，母Mabel Talvasは41歳であった。彼はLafracoth O'Brienとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1119年以後にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク カストルで死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnoulf de Montgomery(이)가 1066년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Montgomery(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Talvas(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Lafracoth O'Brien(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1119년 이후 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 카스틀에서 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoulf de Montgomery nasceu em 1066, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Roger de Montgomery, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Talvas, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Lafracoth O'Brien. Ele faleceu após 1119, em Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, e foi sepultado em França.

ro.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnoulf de Montgomery родился в 1066 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Roger de Montgomery было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Talvas, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Lafracoth O'Brien. Он умер после 1119 г. в местности пемброк кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arnoulf de Montgomery nació en 1066, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Roger de Montgomery, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mabel Talvas, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Lafracoth O'Brien. Murió después de 1119, en Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, y fue sepultado en Francia.
